verdict_reasoning: SRC is a non-receptor tyrosine kinase anchored to the inner leaflet of the PM via N-terminal myristoylation — baseline localization is cytoplasmic-face, not accessible from outside. However, ecto-SRC / surface-displayed active SRC has been documented on tumor cells as part of the broader cancer ecto-kinase phenomenon, where nominally intracellular kinases appear on the outer leaflet of transformed cells. This cancer-state ecto-pool qualifies as cell-state-induced surface display.
